statement: In every magma, Equation 1373 (`x = y * (((z * y) * y) * w)`) implies Equation 3116 (`x = (((y * x) * y) * y) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0067
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z y) y) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) y) y) y)
